_instructions: Edit these values to tune how relationships are scored and prioritized. All weights within a group must sum to 1.0.

scoring_weights._comment: How much each component contributes to the Overall Relationship Score (must sum to 1.0)

closeness_components._comment: Sub-weights within the Closeness score (must sum to 1.0)

momentum_components._comment: Sub-weights within the Momentum score (must sum to 1.0). Recency decays exponentially.

strategic_components._comment: Sub-weights within Strategic Value (must sum to 1.0)

momentum_half_life_days._comment: Days of silence before momentum score drops by half. Shorter = faster decay = more urgency to stay in touch.

cadence_days._comment: Ideal maximum days between contacts before a person is flagged for follow-up.

drift_risk_multipliers._comment: How severely being overdue is penalized by tier. Higher tiers drifting = bigger risk.

category_life_importance._comment: Base importance weight by category. Used in strategic value scoring. Scale 0.0–1.0.

interaction_type_depth_multiplier._comment: How much each interaction type contributes to closeness/momentum. Richer interactions score higher.

auto_tier_thresholds._comment: Fallback auto-tiering when manual_tier_override is null. Blends score + category.

recommendation_counts._comment: How many people to surface per recommendation type in the weekly planner.

_comment_history: History length is capped at this many years for scoring purposes.
